script.title: Daily Panchangam New York, NY | Friday 2026-03-13 | Rahu Kalam & All Timings
script.description: Today's complete Hindu Panchang for New York, NY. Rahu Kalam, Abhijit Muhurta, all auspicious and inauspicious timings in Telugu and English.
script.full_narration: Om Gam Ganapataye Namaha! Namaste friends, New York, NY lo unna mana Telugu families ki today March 13th Friday panchang timings. Krishna Paksha Dashami from Ekadashi 10:40 PM varaku. Purva Ashadha nakshatra 5:33 PM varaku, taruvata Uttara Ashadha. Important ga avoid cheyandi - Rahu Kalam 11:37 AM to 1:06 PM, Dur Muhurtam 9:33 AM to 10:20 AM, Gulika Kalam 8:40 AM to 10:08 AM. Best auspicious times - Brahma Muhurta morning 5:33 to 6:22 AM, afternoon 1:29 to 2:17 PM. Abhijit Muhurta 12:42 to 1:29 PM - idi very good for important work. Vijaya Muhurta 3:04 to 3:51 PM. Amrit Kalam 12:17 to 2:02 PM lo any pooja, business start cheyyochu. Sunrise 7:11 AM, Sunset 7:01 PM New York, NY time. Sri Krishna sharanam! Have a blessed Friday everyone!
